series_metadata.series_description: Inspections in which a business or individuals must comply with Plant Pest Control regulations that may result in the destruction, seizure, restriction, or transport of plants, lumber, grain, seed, and agricultural products. Reports or Forms that may accompany Nursery Stock Rejection Notice, Regulated Article Seizure, Restriction / Seizure Release, or Un-licensed location investigation, and compliance agreements.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: original document will be scanned and paper copy will be retained document is verified readable in our PPC drive; once paper copy is verified readable it will be put in waste paper. ; Electronic: originals are scanned into PPC drive and will be retained electronically
